name: axis
description: AXIS-26 reference plugin for Codex: risk-gated spec-driven development with lifecycle guidance, EARS requirements, CWE review, eval authoring, and drift detection.

interface.shortDescription: Run AXIS-26 risk-gated spec-driven development in Codex.
interface.longDescription: AXIS-26 Core helps Codex apply the AXIS-26 software-delivery method: Specify, Build, Verify, Deploy, and Observe with repository-canonical Markdown artifacts, risk-gated rigor, EARS requirements, CWE scanning guidance, eval authoring, and drift detection.
defaultPrompt: Run AXIS specify for this change
Audit this repo for AXIS conformance
